name: POS Return Reasons
body: [{"type":"h1","children":[{"text":"Return Reasons"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"This feature allows you to create and configure custom reasons for product returns. Staff will be able to select the reason when process a return or exchange. View more details in the "},{"type":"a","url":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/316-return-reason-report","target":"_blank","children":[{"text":"Return Reason"}]},{"text":" report. "}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"To configure your Return Reasons:"}]},{"type":"ol","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Navigate to "},{"text":"Settings > Return Reasons","bold":true}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Enter the "},{"text":"Return Reason","bold":true},{"text":" name\n"}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/XN60LCCNS71U/image-05t5g00000pphaeeaq.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/XN60LCCNS71U/image-05t5g00000pphaeeaq.png","name":"image.05T5g00000pphaEEAQ.png","embedType":"image","float":"none","height":209,"width":595,"displaySize":"large"}}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Tick "},{"text":"Enabled","bold":true}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Click "},{"text":"Insert","bold":true}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Use the "},{"text":"pencil","bold":true},{"text":" icon to edit the name for an existing Reason"}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Click the "},{"text":"trash can ","bold":true},{"text":"icon to delete Return Reasons (you will be unable to delete the Return Reason if it's already been used for a sale)"}]}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]}]
